title: From Courtroom to Grid: Energy, Mining and the Law shaping India’s Infrastructure
description: In this Leading Question piece, Kartik Seth reflects on the evolving regulatory landscape, and the role of law in shaping the country’s energy and mining sector.Question: You have built a practice at the intersection of energy and mining law - two sectors that most lawyers treat as peripheral. What drew you to this space, and what does the India-specific landscape look like today?Answer: My entry into this space was less by design and more by exposure.
